Vinayapiṭaka/Cūḷavaggapāḷi/X/42.text: Sudhammaṁ bhikkhu ... sā āpatti desāpetabbāti (Sī, Syā)

Vinayapiṭaka/Cūḷavaggapāḷi/X/184.text: Imepi cattāro vārā Sī-Syā-potthakesu paripuṇṇā dissanti.

Vinayapiṭaka/Cūḷavaggapāḷi/X/238.text: Tassa kho taṁ bhikkhave (Ka), tassa khvetaṁ bhikkhave (Syā)

Vinayapiṭaka/Cūḷavaggapāḷi/X/289.text: Atha kho āyasmā Sāriputto āyasmantaṁ Mahāmoggallānaṁ etadavoca “pubbe kho me āvuso Moggallāna udaravātābādho lasuṇesu phāsu hotī”ti (Ka)

variants.reading: Atha kho āyasmā Sāriputto āyasmantaṁ Mahāmoggallānaṁ etadavoca “pubbe kho me āvuso Moggallāna udaravātābādho lasuṇesu phāsu hotī”ti

Saṁghabhedakakkhandhaka/Cūḷavaggapāḷi/X/.text: Imassa anantaraṁ kesuci potthakesu evampi pāṭho dissati⎯ “Evaṁ vutte Anuruddhassa Sakkassa matā evamāha ‘sace tāta Anuruddha Bhaddiyo Sakyarājā Sakyānaṁ rajjaṁ kāreti agārasmā anagāriyaṁ pabbajati, evaṁ tvampi pabbajāhī’ti”.

Vinayapiṭaka/Cūḷavaggapāḷi/X/357.text: Na pānīyena pucchanti, na paribhojanīyena pucchanti (Syā, Kaṁ)

Vinayapiṭaka/Cūḷavaggapāḷi/X/358.text: Na pānīyena pucchanti, na paribhojanīyena pucchanti (Syā, Kaṁ)

Vinayapiṭaka/Cūḷavaggapāḷi/X/366.text: (Atthi bhante nakkhattapadānīti, na jānāma āvusoti, atthi bhante disābhāganti, na jānāma āvusoti.) Sī, Vimatiṭīkāya pana sameti.

Bhikkhunikkhandhaka/Cūḷavaggapāḷi/X/402.text: Aṁ 3. 103 piṭṭhe pana “atha kho āyasmato Ānandassa etadahosī”ti āgataṁ.

Vinayapiṭaka/Cūḷavaggapāḷi/X/412.text: Tena kho pana samayena bhikkhū (Syā, Kaṁ)
